category_sources: source_facts.description says Python powered Fortran preprocessor; official Fypp docs describe preprocessing source files into output files.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is "Fypp documentation"; source_facts.name is fypp.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to Fypp Read the Docs stable documentation; official docs include Getting started, language, build integration, and API sections.
repo_sources: Official Fypp Read the Docs getting-started page gives the development clone URL as https://github.com/aradi/fypp.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Python-powered Fortran preprocessor; official Fypp docs say installation provides the fypp CLI and Python module, and cover Make/Waf/CMake integration.
